# Install with:
#   pip install -r requirements.txt \
#     --extra-index-url https://flashinfer.ai/whl/cu121/torch2.3/
#
# For Colab (auto-detects CUDA/torch version), run env/setup.sh instead.

# Core ML stack
torch==2.3.0
triton==2.3.0
flashinfer==0.1.6

# Model loading
transformers==4.44.0
accelerate==0.32.0

# Numerics and plotting
numpy==1.26.4
scipy==1.13.1
pandas==2.2.2
matplotlib==3.9.0

# Reporting
prettytable==3.10.2

# SGLang Part 2 — requires Ampere (sm_80+). Uncomment and follow
# integration/README.md for the sgl_kernel source build.
# sglang==0.2.13
